## Exercise concept

What should the agent build, debug, or refactor?

## Why this exercise

What skill or failure mode does this exercise test that existing exercises don't cover?

## Proposed difficulty

- [ ] Beginner (greenfield, single file, <15 tests)
- [ ] Intermediate (multi-file or debugging, 15-25 tests)
- [ ] Advanced (5+ bugs, 3+ files, cascading failures, compaction stress)

## Language

- [ ] Python
- [ ] Go
- [ ] JavaScript/TypeScript
- [ ] Other: ___

## Sketch

A rough outline of the exercise spec (inputs, outputs, edge cases, test count).
